summary: Hand-authored friendly 'quote' command (transfer + hourly) plus compare/fit/trip: geocode pickup/dropoff via OpenStreetMap Nominatim, POST /prices, render vehicle classes.
reason: The /prices request body is deeply nested (pickup/dropoff objects, seconds-based hourly duration) and needs free geocoding to be usable; the generator's templated 'prices' command can't express this.
validated_outcome: Live: JFK->Times Square transfer and Union Square SF 3h hourly both return real USD prices; fit picks the cheapest class that seats N.
